title: BEM-924 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM924_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL.md with content # BEM-924 FINAL WORKING SYSTEM PROTOCOL
Status: FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-31
Purpose: one final unified implementation protocol to evolve the repository from raw/partial state to a working managing system.
Correction applied:
- This is not Telegram-only, not provider-only, not prompt-only.
- Telegram, provider model, prompts, registries, dispatch, managed channel, GitHub Actions, proof and Claude re-audit are modules of one system.
- The protocol answers: current state, target working state, exact roadmap, acceptance criteria, operator gates and release criteria.
Definition of working system:
- Operator task enters through approved interface.
- It is converted to envelope and routed to GD Curator.
- It moves vertically through curators and horizontally between internal contours.
- Internal contour runs Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision cycles through Analyst until auditor-approved result.
- Logical roles are executed by selected providers with primary/fallback evidence.
- Every transition is written to event log, managed channel and/or dispatch state.
- Every release PASS has proof and non-null CI/Git SHA.
- Operator receives canonical report on demand or configured period.
- Claude can re-audit evidence without relying on GPT self-claims.
Final roadmap:
- BEM-925: SSOT foundation: elements_registry, contours_registry, providers_registry, provider policies, prompt templates, object refs.
- BEM-926: Core workflow hardening: concurrency, release_proof_manifest, non-null CI/Git SHA, proof policy, fixed re-audit checklist.
- BEM-927: Dispatch and managed channel runtime: provider-aware queue lifecycle, auto-trigger decision, managed channel consumer, event log transitions.
- BEM-928: Object and contour execution lifecycle: curator/object runners, internal contour algorithm, provider-aware failover, role reports.
- BEM-929: Telegram operator interface: input envelope, mapping to managed channel, GD Curator primary route, optional curator routes, canonical reports, report_period_config owner OPERATOR.
- BEM-930: E2E operational tests: mock Telegram command -> GD Curator -> DIR -> WRK -> provider-aware contour -> proof -> canonical report; mock_status and production_status split.
- BEM-931: Production operator gate: secret names, webhook, schedule/daemon model, issue #31 permission, paid API/LLM runtime, real pilot choice.
- BEM-932: Claude re-audit package and release decision: bundle checklist, evidence, gaps, PASS/CONDITIONAL/FAIL.
Worker agreement:
- Request: governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM924_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_REQUEST.md
- Worker review: governance/audit/internal/results/BEM924_WORKER_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_REVIEW.md
- Curator response: governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM924_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_RESPONSE.md
